zh.Cedewain, Montgomery, Wales: 英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alswn verch Maredudd於大約1210年出生在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾時，她的父親Maredudd ap Robert Lord of Cedewain67歲，母親Efa ferch Maredudd Fychan67歲。她於大約1240年與Llewellyn ap Meilir Gryg of Llwyn在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Cedewain, Montgomery, Wales: 英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alswn verch Maredudd于大约1210年出生在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾时，她的父亲Maredudd ap Robert Lord of Cedewain67岁，母亲Efa ferch Maredudd Fychan67岁。她于大约1240年与Llewellyn ap Meilir Gryg of Llwyn在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Alswn verch Maredudd was born about 1210, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, her father, Maredudd ap Robert Lord of Cedewain, was 67 and her mother, Efa ferch Maredudd Fychan, was 67. She married Llewellyn ap Meilir Gryg of Llwyn about 1240, in Montgomeryshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters.

fr.Cedewain, Montgomery, Wales: Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alswn verch Maredudd est née environ 1210, à Montgomeryshire, Galles, son père, Maredudd ap Robert Lord of Cedewain, avait 67 ans et sa mère, Efa ferch Maredudd Fychan, avait 67 ans. Elle a épousé Llewellyn ap Meilir Gryg of Llwyn environ 1240, à Montgomeryshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alswn verch Maredudd um 1210 in Montgomeryshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Maredudd ap Robert Lord of Cedewain 67 und ihre Mutter Efa ferch Maredudd Fychan 67. Sie hat um 1240 in Montgomeryshire, Wales Llewellyn ap Meilir Gryg of Llwyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alswn verch Maredudd è nata il circa 1210 nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, sua padre, Maredudd ap Robert Lord of Cedewain, aveva 67 anni e sua madre, Efa ferch Maredudd Fychan, aveva 67 anni. Lei sposato Llewellyn ap Meilir Gryg of Llwyn circa 1240, nel Montgomeryshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Alswn verch Mareduddが約1210年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアで生まれた時，父Maredudd ap Robert Lord of Cedewainは67歳，母Efa ferch Maredudd Fychanは67歳であった。約1240年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアでLlewellyn ap Meilir Gryg of Llwynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Alswn verch Maredudd(이)가 대략 1210년 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Maredudd ap Robert Lord of Cedewain(은)는 67세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Efa ferch Maredudd Fychan(은)는 67세였다. 그녀는 대략 1240년 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 Llewellyn ap Meilir Gryg of Llwyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alswn verch Maredudd nasceu aproximadamente 1210, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, seu pai, Maredudd ap Robert Lord of Cedewain, tinha 67 anos e sua mãe, Efa ferch Maredudd Fychan, tinha 67 anos. Ela casou-se com Llewellyn ap Meilir Gryg of Llwyn aproximadamente 1240, em Montgomeryshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas.

ro.Cedewain, Montgomery, Wales: Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alswn verch Maredudd родилась около 1210 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Maredudd ap Robert Lord of Cedewain было 67 лет, а матери, которую звали Efa ferch Maredudd Fychan, 67. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Llewellyn ap Meilir Gryg of Llwyn около 1240 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alswn verch Maredudd nació aproximadamente 1210, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, su papá, Maredudd ap Robert Lord of Cedewain, tenía 67 años y su mamá, Efa ferch Maredudd Fychan, tenía 67 años. Se casó con Llewellyn ap Meilir Gryg of Llwyn aproximadamente 1240, en Montgomeryshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas.
